name: Tandoori Chicken Kebabs with Cauliflower & Red Peppers
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Red bell peppers, cut into 1-inch pieces
8 Bamboo skewers, soaked in water 30 minutes
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the first ten ingredients in a blender or food processor.
2. Pour 1/4 cup of yogurt mixture into a small bowl and cover; chill.
3. Pour the remaining mixture into a medium bowl; add chicken and toss to coat. Cover and chill for at least one hour, up to 24 hours.
4. Cook cauliflower in a pot of boiling salted water until crisp-tender, about 2 minutes. Drain.
5. Rinse cauliflower under cold water.
6. Add the cauliflower to 1/4 cup of yogurt mixture and toss.
7. Thread red bell peppers, chicken, and cauliflower onto skewers.
8. Prepare the barbecue for medium heat.
9. Grill until the chicken is cooked through, about 7 minutes per side.
